name: ronin
description: Counter archetype: a slow, relentless samurai who blocks or blinks past anything that gets close, then answers with steel.

sprite_files._comment: Character-authored PNG frame sets (generic loader path in laser/characters.py). remove_bg false: these PNGs already carry real alpha, so the near-black bg-removal pass is skipped to protect the dark outlines. Per-set src_head_px matches each set's own source scale to roster size (TARGET_HEAD_PX).

combo._comment: Overrides generic combo defaults (combat._COMBO_DEFAULTS/combo_cfg). max_hits:1 means the counter-slash's landed hit always completes the attack string immediately — no chained dashslash/arcslash follow-up. Ronin's only attacks are the reaction counter-slash and the vanish_cut ultimate.

reaction._comment: Counter fantasy core (generic engine system, combat.check_reaction): enemy body within radius_px rolls counter_chance between COUNTER (deflect window + retaliation slash) and DODGE (blink blink_behind_px past the enemy — already an instant blink_warp here). Ronin also opts into dodge_style:blink so the separate generic melee dodge triggers in systems.py (incoming-projectile sidestep, incoming-dash counter) resolve as instant sideways/toward-target blinks instead of the default physical dodge_dashing move. One shared cooldown. Each activation adds one vanish_cut charge.

ultimate_playback._comment: Flash Cut (generic vanish_cut style, combat.tick_vanish_cut): at charges_required reaction charges — vanish + freeze frame, then `hits` rapid strikes of hit_damage each with crossing slash FX, crossed finisher pair ('split in half'), reappear reappear_past_px past the target in stand-down facing.

battle_semantics.attach: per fx layer on can_hit layers
battle_semantics.trigger: reaction block drives counter/dodge; ultimate is charge-based (vanish_cut)
battle_semantics.damage: basic slash via built-in melee FSM; ultimate hits authored in ultimate_playback
battle_semantics.attack: melee dash/arc string (built-in), retaliation slash from counter
battle_semantics.defence: deflect (generalized parry) via defend layer L1
battle_semantics.parity: identical Solo/Battle — reaction + vanish_cut route through CombatSystem

outline_glow._comment: Generic engine feature (config.OUTLINE_GLOW_*, characters._outline_glow) — solid black outline hugging the sprite silhouette.

trail_gradient._comment: Generic engine feature (config.TRAIL_GRADIENT_*, characters._trail_gradient, components.TrailComponent._color_at) — replaces the default flowing LUT trail colour with a static tail-to-head gradient: solid start_color for the first start_fraction of the trail, fading to end_color over the remainder.

sprite_emitter._comment: Blade-line resonance FX (generic engine system, combat.update_sprite_emitter): sprite frames are colour-scanned for each source's match_color; the ORANGE line continuously emits small rising particles that inherit part of the figure's velocity backwards (trail) and fade out, drifting upward at a slowed rise_speed; the BLUE line only glows — pulsing dots pinned to the line, no emission — and is flagged trail_anchor:true, so the movement trail (normally body-anchored) instead pins live each frame to that line's point farthest from the sprite centre (the sword tip), through both normal movement and combat dashes/dodges. infer_missing_frames fills the walk frames and Samuraistand 1 (which carry no coloured line) from the nearest matching frame so the effect runs across the whole loop. Purely cosmetic; identical in Solo & Battle.
